macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Major U.S. Stock Indexes Decline on March 13
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 0.60% to 6,632.53, the Nasdaq Composite dropped 0.93% to 22,105.36, and the Dow Jones declined 0.25% to 46,559.83 on March 13, 2026.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Strengthens Market Dominance Above $71,000
items.summary: Bitcoin traded above $71,000 USDT on March 14, 2026, with a minimal 0.23% 24-hour decline, reinforcing its dominance amid uneven altcoin recovery and institutional focus. Exchange outflows signal long-term accumulation as BTC eyes $75,000 resistance.

items.title: BlackRock Launches Staked Ethereum ETF Amid Bitcoin ETF Outflows
items.summary: BlackRock introduced the iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHB), offering spot ETH holdings with staking yields for institutions, redirecting $2.5B in capital. Meanwhile, spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $166M outflows on Thursday, extending five-week redemptions to $2.7B year-to-date.

items.title: FATF Issues New Guidance Requiring VASP Licensing Globally
items.summary: The FATF updated guidance mandating countries to license and supervise virtual asset service providers (VASPs) for AML/CFT compliance, aiming to close regulatory loopholes. This coincides with U.S. DOJ probe into Binance for alleged $1B+ sanctions evasion via Iran.

items.title: Stablecoins Emerge as Key Crypto Infrastructure in 2026
items.summary: Stablecoins are gaining prominence as standalone financial infrastructure linking exchanges, payments, DeFi, and corporate services, beyond mere trading tools. Market selectivity favors projects with strong ecosystems, liquidity, and institutional appeal amid Bitcoin's lead.

items.title: XRP Faces Utility Challenges Despite Regulatory Wins
items.summary: XRP's price continues a multi-month downtrend with unrealized losses for holders, despite Ripple's lawsuit resolution and ETF launches. Growth now hinges on converting institutional partnerships into sustained payment network usage.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Lucid Outlines Path to Cash Flow Positive and Announces Uber Robotaxi Partnership
items.summary: Luxury electric vehicle maker Lucid has detailed a strategy to achieve cash flow positivity and introduced a robotaxi partnership with Uber. Lucid's CFO discussed the plans in a Bloomberg Technology interview.

items.title: Tesla Unveils LED-Lit Robotaxi Logo at Austin Autonomy Pop-Up Event
items.summary: Tesla has introduced an active LED-lit Robotaxi logo, first showcased at the Tesla Autonomy Pop-Up event in Austin, Texas on March 13–14, 2026. The feature was confirmed on-site by attendee @JoeTegtmeyer.

items.title: Google Completes $4.75 Billion Acquisition of Power Producer Intersect for Data Center Energy
items.summary: Google acquired independent power producer Intersect for $4.75 billion to integrate electricity generation with data center operations, addressing surging power demands. This move highlights growing renewable energy investments tied to data centers.
